---
name: Style / Preset Request
about: Request a new blade style, effect, ignition, or character preset
title: "[Style] "
labels: style-request
assignees: ''
---

## Request Type

- [ ] New blade style (e.g., Aurora, Prism)
- [ ] New effect (e.g., clash, blast variant)
- [ ] New ignition / retraction animation
- [ ] Character preset (film-accurate saber)
- [ ] Other

## Description

Describe the visual behavior you're looking for.

## Reference

Help us understand the look you're going for:
- **Character / source**: (e.g., Ahsoka Tano — Rebels S4, Cal Kestis — Jedi Survivor)
- **Timestamp or clip**: (link to a YouTube clip, GIF, or screenshot if possible)
- **Existing ProffieOS code**: (if you have working code that achieves this, paste it below)

```cpp
// Paste existing ProffieOS style code here, if applicable
```

## Visual Behavior

Describe the key visual characteristics:
- **Base color(s)**:
- **Motion reactivity**: (e.g., color shifts on swing, flicker on clash)
- **Special behavior**: (e.g., unstable core, tip drag, rainbow scroll)
- **Ignition style**: (e.g., scroll up, center out, spark shower)

## ProffieOS Compatibility

- **Target board**: Proffieboard V2.2 / V3.9 / both
- **Must compile on ProffieOS**: 7.x
- **Prop file**: (e.g., saber_fett263_buttons.h, or any)

## Priority

How important is this to you?
- [ ] Nice to have — would love to see it eventually
- [ ] Important — this is a common/popular style
- [ ] High — a lot of people are asking for this
